package.name: openral_hal_panda_mobile
package.description: OpenRAL HAL lifecycle node for the panda_mobile embodiment (Franka 7-DoF arm on a holonomic 3-DoF planar base). Wraps PandaMobileHAL (from openral-hal) as a ROS 2 managed lifecycle node. Publishes /joint_states (10-DoF: 3 base + 7 arm), /odom (nav_msgs/Odometry derived from the base pose), and /scan (sensor_msgs/LaserScan — synthesised from the live MJCF when a MuJoCo handle is bound at configure-time; an all-max-range "no hit" fan otherwise). Broadcasts the odom -> base_link TF so slam_toolbox and Nav2 can resolve frames. Subscribes /openral/safe_action and /openral/estop. ADR-0024 / ADR-0025.
